title: zanthoxylum rhoifolium var. formosanum
intro: Zanthoxylum rhoifolium var. formosanum, also known as Taiwanese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Taiwan. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Taiwanese medicine. Zanthoxylum rhoifolium var. formosanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
